---
name: New Worked Example
about: Propose a new worked example tracing a threat or property through the ESF phases
title: "[Example] "
labels: example, enhancement
---

**What threat or property?**
Describe the specific attack vector, security property, or defense mechanism to trace through the ESF.

**Which phases are covered?**
List the ESF phases this example would demonstrate (ideally all 10, but partial examples are welcome).

**Why is this example valuable?**
What does it illustrate that existing examples don't? (e.g., a different attack class, a different domain, a different maturity pattern)

**Draft outline (optional)**
If you have a rough outline of the example, include it here.
